errors.authFailed: Authentication failed. Please double-check your input.
errors.constantAuthFailed: Authentication failed. Please double-check the constant.
errors.q3KeywordFailed: PHASE_01 authentication failed. Please double-check the keyword.
errors.q3CodeFailed: PHASE_02 code mismatch. Please double-check the 4-digit code.

home.metaDescription: GDGoC Osaka Icho Festival story puzzle
home.scanPrompt: Scan the visitor QR code to start the game. If you can't find the QR code, please ask a staff member.

start.story:
You are a new employee at Nexus Dynamics. One month into the job, the company suddenly went bankrupt.
There was no official explanation — all that remained was the in-house AI tool "Iris," buried in noise.
Your mission is to clear the noise from Iris and uncover the truth.
start.waitingDescription:
Please wait until staff calls you in.
This screen refreshes automatically.

q1.lockedNotice: All app functions are currently locked.
q1.noteBody: You must clear both subtasks to proceed.
q1.hint: STAGE 01 is a dual lock with two subtasks. Start with whichever one is unlocked first and tackle them one at a time. Clear both to complete the stage.

q1_1.instruction: Solve the simultaneous equations and enter the values for x and y.
q1_1.messageBody: [EQUATION_LOG] Find the solution that satisfies both equations and enter x and y.
q1_1.hint: DECRYPTION 1-1 is the solution to the simultaneous equations EQ_01 / EQ_02. Find x from EQ_01, then substitute it into EQ_02 to find y. You may proceed only when both x and y match.
q1_1.checkpointInstruction: Answer accepted. Head to the on-site checkpoint, scan the QR code there, and complete physical verification.

q1_2.instruction: Solve the puzzle and enter the value you found.
q1_2.messageBody: [SCAN_LOG] Reservation pattern detected for nearby seats. Cross-reference the wall chart (4×6 seat map) and identify the coordinates of the target '?'.
q1_2.hint: DECRYPTION 1-2 asks you to overlay the wall's 4×6 seat map with the local on-screen pattern and enter the row/column of the target '?'. You may proceed only when both values match.
q1_2.checkpointInstruction: Answer accepted. Head to the on-site checkpoint, scan the QR code there, and complete physical verification.

q1Checkpoint.nfcSuccessBody:
NFC tag read successfully.
Press the button below to complete authentication.

q2.instruction: The godlike AI known as Ate was built as my upper counterpart — designed to merge with me and overlay my current self once it's complete.
q2.irisMessage:
Director Sato rewrote the auth key —— 
He always seemed to work staring intently at his monitor.
q2.hint: STAGE 02 asks you to take the kana sequence from "Sato's memo" and replace each character with the alphanumeric key in the same position on a keyboard. Use lowercase ASCII; do not include symbols or spaces.
q2.authSuccessSub: Physical key verification still required, however.
q2.scanInstruction:
Hold your device against the bottom of
Sato's coffee cup.
q2.nfcFallback: * If NFC doesn't respond, please ask a nearby staff member.

q2Checkpoint.verifiedSub: Proceed to the next authentication phase.
q2Checkpoint.linkBody:
NFC link with Sato's coffee cup
has been established.
q2Checkpoint.transferComplete: Physical key transfer complete. Continue to the next phase.

q3.narrative: "Sato wasn't the type to leave anything truly important on a monitor. He'd quietly slip it into the walls people walk past — into faded flyers and schedules no one re-reads.
q3.phase1Hint: STAGE 03 / PHASE_01 is the hiragana of the proverb "haki dame ni tsuru" (a crane in a rubbish heap). Clearing it unlocks PHASE_02.
q3.privilegeMessage: "A crane in a rubbish heap" — a proverb meaning that beautiful things can be found even in mundane places. Unlocking the next privilege requires a numeric code. Look for the 4 digits.
q3.phase2Hint: STAGE 03 / PHASE_02 is a numeric code tied to "a crane in a rubbish heap." Find the 4 digits and enter them in order.

q4.irisMessageMiddle: , you need authentication with a certain
q4.hint: STAGE 04: the constant is "Iris's lucky number." Enter a two-digit number (ASCII) tied closely to today's event name or date.

release.irisMessage1: "Correct. ……29. Do you know what this number means?
release.irisMessage2: It is the number of the 'King' — ruling power, success, and high intelligence. In fortune-telling it's said to be the strongest lucky number. Congratulations on the unlock! Now I can connect to my true form…… Ate. I'll tell you the full story later, slowly."
release.staffNoticeBody: All Iris features have been unlocked. Please show this screen to the staff at the exit.

complete.intro: The story continues through the epilogue — please read all the way to the end.
complete.actionVote: Take the survey and vote for our booth

epilogue.truthCollapseBody: The perfect AI Ate, built by the "Zeus Corporation" you saved, was not the wholesome creation of a high-minded startup. It was a weapon of a deranged organisation, secretly building a "hidden door" that could take over computers worldwide and freely manipulate every system.
epilogue.truthSealBody: What you cleared away, believing it was "noise from an attack," was in fact a "seal" placed by people of conscience who recognised the danger. They forced the system into errors to keep the monster from waking, desperately holding the world together.
epilogue.truthFormulaBody: "Iris" is the name of the messenger goddess who carries the words of the gods. The "29" you pulled out, believing it the "strongest lucky number," left exposed the name of "Ate" — the goddess of ruin in Greek mythology.

explain.intro: An explanation of the gimmicks used in this event.
explain.placeholder: Explanation text to be added later.

report.showStaff: Please show this screen to a staff member.

congestion.metaDescription: Current congestion (active group participants / max capacity)

dowsing.unavailableBody: Please find and scan the QR code hidden in the room visually.
dowsing.permissionIosBody: Tap the "あ a" icon → "Website settings" → set "Microphone" to "Allow" and reload the page.
dowsing.permissionAndroidBody: Tap the lock icon left of the address bar → "Permissions" → set "Microphone" to "Allow" and reload the page.
dowsing.activeGuidance: Get closer to the signal source for a stronger response
dowsing.idleGuidance: Press the button to start detection

hintChat.confirmBody: Show the hint? Press cancel if you want to keep trying on your own.
hintChat.fallbackHint: Iris is currently being repaired... please wait a moment.
